title: External Merge Sort
description: Implement external merge sort for data that doesn't fit in memory, using file-based chunking and k-way merge.
requirements: Function ExternalSort(input io.Reader, output io.Writer, chunkSize int)
Split input into sorted chunks that fit in memory
Write sorted chunks to temporary files
Implement k-way merge of sorted chunks
Clean up temporary files after completion
Support custom serialization via Encoder/Decoder interfaces

few_shot_examples.prompt: Read and sort chunks from input.
